rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGINIA STEWART
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. The following issues have not been addressed sufficiently: 1) Notice to Pamela Stewart 2) Proposed order: as all funds are in blocked accounts, the proposed distribution must include language ordering specific withdrawals from those blocked accounts. The order must specify the names of the banks, how much is in each bank, and provide the specific distribution of the amounts in each bank.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: hearing. both counsel and the Guardian must appear to address the comingling of funds, use of the minor's funds for support obligation of the parent, and request for approval of fees for the Guardian. prior to the hearing, counsel must file the receipt, confirmation of payment, or other document supporting the air fare charge. Even though payment was made by credit card, there is always some form of confirmation that shows flight details, how many tickets were purchased, etc.
